authorization: Authorize S10-D2 lifecycle park report only.

candidate.strategy_class: cross-asset Donchian breakout, no-pyramid, reparameterised capital

cost_stress_pass_summary.interpretation: S2 is 93.9% of S1; S3 is 84.7% of S1; smooth and monotonically-decreasing-but-positive across the cost-stress range. Cost-stress dimension survives.

future_options_listed_but_not_authorized.meta: NONE of these options is pre-approved. Each requires a separate fresh sealed operator authorization. Listing here is purely informational.

options.note: Pursue S11-D1 MNQ.c.0 single-instrument long-history Tier-N as the next research track (already specified at parallel-session commit 9c630886).
Extend the OOS window past 2025-12-31 once additional Databento history is available. Today's data cut would add ~5 months of additional bars.
Run the OOS cost-stress matrix S0-S4 against the OOS window (A8 was correctly skipped at P10 OOS gate). This would test whether the cost-stress robustness observed on IS holds on OOS data as well.
Author a new Tier-N candidate using a different universe (e.g., currency futures, agricultural futures, or a regime-overlay variant) and run it through the full sealed lifecycle.

is_evidence_summary.source: P6 IS diagnostic at commit d6977631 (seal e6cdc7c68a9e2b7b)

k10_pass_summary.independent_corroboration_this_session: This controller session also ran K10 independently producing avg=+0.040090 / eff_bets=3.5706 / CLEARS; small ordering-difference in inner-join; verdict identical; this session duplicate discarded at ed046d54
k10_pass_summary.method: derive_rth_daily_bars + simple daily returns + Pearson + unweighted mean of 6 pairs
k10_pass_summary.note: Universe diversification gate clears by ~10x margin

oos_gating_review_summary.oos_driver: out_of_sample_driver.py (sibling driver authored at P3.6 BUILD f0b3721; preserves in_sample_driver.py byte-stable)
oos_gating_review_summary.source: OOS scope reconciliation and gating review at commit b6a22110 (seal c57bb806ca56e158)

prior_park_precedents_referenced.common_lesson: Each Tier-N candidate parks (or rejects) under a distinct, well-articulated binding-constraint root. The framework consistently refuses to overinterpret directionally-encouraging results when a specific gate fires.

s10_d1.binding_constraint: DR9 fired (cross-symbol data continuity gt 5 missing)

s10_d2.binding_constraint: OOS window length (3 years; 53 trades < K9 100 threshold)

s9.binding_constraint: K1+K2 fired on RSI-2 cross-asset ETF proxy

seal_method: sha256 over json.dumps(obj, sort_keys=True, separators=(",",":"), ensure_ascii=False) EXCLUDING report_seal_sha256 + seal_method

p6_5_cost_stress_matrix.note: This session canonical path; deterministic driver produced byte-equivalent metrics to parallel f9a34674de4f7fdf at non-colliding path

why_no_review_queue_mutation.reason_1: S10-D2 PARK is a research-side lifecycle decision; review_queue.json is a Strategy Lab operational artifact that controls trading flow.
why_no_review_queue_mutation.reason_2: Mutating review_queue.json would imply this candidate is queued for human review prior to trading; PARKED candidates are explicitly not queued for trading review.
why_no_review_queue_mutation.reason_3: P11 explicit_blocked_actions includes DO NOT mutate review_queue.json.
why_no_review_queue_mutation.reason_4: S10-D2 has never been inserted into review_queue and will not be inserted by this PARK report.

why_no_strategy_lab_promotion.reason_1: Tier-N research framework is structurally separated from Strategy Lab; promotion requires a verdict that explicitly authorizes promotion. INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE / PARKED_SAFE_BUT_OOS_INDETERMINATE_K9_FIRED is not such a verdict.
why_no_strategy_lab_promotion.reason_2: S10-D2 P11 explicit_blocked_actions includes DO NOT make any profitability claim outside this conservative PARK framing.
why_no_strategy_lab_promotion.reason_3: Strategy Lab promotion would require FRC + a CONFIRMED OOS verdict + live-readiness, none of which exist for S10-D2.
why_no_strategy_lab_promotion.reason_4: The Strategy Lab path is reserved for verdict READY_FOR_LIVE_PROMOTION (or equivalent), which is not in the s10-D2 chain's allowed enum.

why_not_live_ready.reason_1: verdict_never_means_live_ready is a permanent invariant on every Tier-N candidate; no verdict can promote a candidate to live or paper trading.
why_not_live_ready.reason_2: live_promotion_path_closed is True. The 6-gate live block is permanent regardless of any research verdict.
why_not_live_ready.reason_3: OOS sample was below the K9 threshold of 100 closed trades; INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE is by definition not a confirmation of edge.
why_not_live_ready.reason_4: FRC (full research clearance) was never granted to this candidate.
why_not_live_ready.reason_5: No threshold loosening (e.g., relaxing K9 to claim OOS PASS) is permitted by the framework; explicit_blocked_actions at P11 includes 'DO NOT relax K9 threshold to confirm OOS'.
why_not_live_ready.reason_7: Trading status is and remains PAUSED.

why_parked.primary_reason: OOS sample insufficient. Closed-trade count on the 3-year OOS window was 53 (below K9 threshold of 100 and below A1 acceptance threshold of 100). This is a function of available history length, not a function of the strategy.
secondary_observations: OOS direction was consistent with IS (positive sharpe, expectancy, net PnL).
All safety counters held zero across IS + 5 cost tiers + OOS (no K6 fire).
Drawdown actually improved on OOS (-12.96% vs IS -28.31%).
Trade density was preserved at 88% of IS rate, demonstrating the s8-D1 sizing-fix lesson was correctly applied at $500,000 starting cash.
Per-trade expectancy degraded to 0.44x of IS; per-trade sharpe degraded to 0.70x of IS.
why_parked.why_not_advance: Lacking statistical confirmation is not a basis for advancement. Advancing to a longer OOS, OOS cost-stress, or any tighter validation would each be a fresh research hypothesis requiring its own sealed authorization.
why_parked.why_not_kill: Safety counters held zero throughout. Performance K-gates K1/K2/K4 did not fire on OOS. OOS direction is consistent with IS. The chain ran cleanly and produced an interpretable INDETERMINATE result; discarding usable evidence would be wrong.
